source_pr.title: planner/core: check the window func arg first before checking window specs
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Fix https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/11008.



### What is changed and how it works?
it seems not a good idea but we need to be compatible with mysql. 
so here, when extract windows funcs, it the continue to check the window arg. when checking window func arg, it need to be able to do the expression check.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test  -- added
 - Integration test -- the explain test tool is changed because the plan id increased. and the error EOF is ignored in test.


Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change -- add a function to check the window args. 


Side effects
- Increased code complexity and the process of parsing and check arg is done twice.

symptoms: sql: "SELECT NTH_VALUE(fieldA, ATAN(-1)) OVER (w1) AS 'ntile', fieldA, fieldB FROM ( SELECT a AS fieldA, b AS fieldB FROM t ) as te WINDOW w1 AS ( ORDER BY fieldB ASC, fieldA DESC )", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "SELECT NTH_VALUE(fieldA, ATAN(-1)) OVER (w1) AS 'ntile', fieldA, fieldB FROM ( SELECT a AS fieldA, b AS fieldB FROM t ) as te WINDOW w1 AS ( ORDER BY fieldB ASC, fieldA DESC )", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR fixes planner window-function argument validation and updates the explain-test harness/results (including treating `io.EOF` from `ReadAt` as non-fatal). These are correctness/test-tool changes, not an explicit flaky stabilization fix with a clear flaky signature, so we classify it conservatively.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: sql: "SELECT NTH_VALUE(fieldA, ATAN(-1)) OVER (w1) AS 'ntile', fieldA, fieldB FROM ( SELECT a AS fieldA, b AS fieldB FROM t ) as te WINDOW w1 AS ( ORDER BY fieldB ASC, fieldA DESC )", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
files: planner/core/logical_plan_builder.go, planner/core/logical_plan_test.go, cmd/explaintest/main.go, cmd/explaintest/r/window_function.result, expression/integration_test.go
